children.text: The Secretary shall establish an automated management information system for the Service.

children.label: B
children.text: a patient care information system for each area served by the Service,

children.label: C
children.text: a privacy component that protects the privacy of patient information held by, or on behalf of, the Service, and

children.label: D
children.text: a services-based cost accounting component that provides estimates of the costs associated with the provision of specific medical treatments or services in each area office of the Service.

children.heading: Provision to Indian tribes and organizations; reimbursement
children.label: b Provision to Indian tribes and organizations; reimbursement
A
children.text: meet the management information needs of such Indian tribe or tribal organization with respect to the treatment by the Indian tribe or tribal organization of patients of the Service, and

children.label: B
children.text: meet the management information needs of the Service.

The Secretary shall reimburse each Indian tribe or tribal organization for the part of the cost of the operation of a system provided under paragraph (1) which is attributable to the treatment by such Indian tribe or tribal organization of patients of the Service.
The Secretary shall provide systems under paragraph (1) to Indian tribes and tribal organizations providing health services in California by no later than .September 30, 1990

children.heading: Access to records
children.label: c Access to records
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, each patient shall have reasonable access to the medical or health records of such patient which are held by, or on behalf of, the Service.
